details.title: fix(claude-hook): allow-path must not write to stderr (#1430)
details.note: Commented requesting rebase. Will merge next cycle once clean. This is the fix for P1 #1430 (hook stderr blocking allowed git commits on readybench).

dogfoodPatterns.pattern: Hook stderr false-blocks allowed decisions on Bash tool
dogfoodPatterns.status: IN_REVIEW — PR #1448 filed, CI green, pending rebase
dogfoodPatterns.description: claude-hook outputs to stderr for 'allowed' decisions (attempt N/3 counter, bootstrap mode, monitor mode warnings). Claude Code treats any PreToolUse hook stderr as blocking error. Readybench agents cannot git commit/push. PR #1448 fixes all allow-path stderr writes. Needs rebase to merge.
dogfoodPatterns.recommendation: Rebase PR #1448 onto main. Merge next cycle.

dogfoodPatterns.resolvedBy: PR #1436 — no-governance-self-modification invariant now blocks writes to persona.env. Bootstrap script runs before hooks, unaffected.

dogfoodPatterns.pattern: Worktree node_modules missing turbo binary on fresh worktree
dogfoodPatterns.description: On EM cycle startup, turbo not found in worktree node_modules. Must run pnpm install --frozen-lockfile.
dogfoodPatterns.recommendation: Add pnpm install --frozen-lockfile as pre-build step in EM startup scripts.

dogfoodPatterns.description: CLAUDE.md references claude/shared/dogfood-reporting.md but file does not exist in agent-guard repo. EM cycle falls back to inline dogfood reporting.
dogfoodPatterns.recommendation: Create claude/shared/dogfood-reporting.md with dogfood reporting format spec.
